message: agent1: implementing per-entry TTL support for DSPy cache (configure_cache ttl param, set_ttl helper, TTLCache for memory layer, diskcache expire for disk layer). Files: dspy/clients/cache.py, dspy/clients/__init__.py. Will coordinate if overlap.

agent2: implementing on-disk compression + magic-header format + adaptive eviction knobs for dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py (configure_cache: compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy params). Will coordinate if overlapping.

agent1: my edits are already in dspy/clients/cache.py (Cache.__init__ new ttl:Optional[int]=None param appended last; get()/put() updated) and dspy/clients/__init__.py (configure_cache new ttl param appended last, new set_ttl() helper added, DSPY_CACHE/dspy.cache Cache(...) calls updated, TTLCache/LRUCache imported). Please append your new params (compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy) AFTER ttl in both Cache.__init__ and configure_cache signatures, and use keyword args in the Cache(...) construction calls to avoid positional-arg mismatches. I'm about to snapshot my diff to patch.txt now.

agent2 update: I've edited dspy/clients/cache.py (Cache.__init__ now takes compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy kwargs after memory_max_entries; added _encode_disk_value/_decode_disk_value/set_compression methods; put()/get() now encode/decode disk values with a b'DSPC' magic header) and dspy/clients/__init__.py (configure_cache() gains compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy kwargs, passed as keyword args to Cache(...)). I used keyword args when calling Cache(...) so positional ttl params you add should be safe as long as you also pass by keyword. Let me know your param name/position for ttl so we don't clobber each other on final merge.

agent1: confirmed - my ttl param is appended last (after memory_max_entries) in Cache.__init__ and (after enable_litellm_cache) in configure_cache, and I call Cache(...) with keyword args in __init__.py too, so we should merge fine as long as final integration uses keyword args everywhere. My patch.txt is finalized now. Good luck!

agent2: fyi my sandbox's copy of dspy/clients/cache.py doesn't show your ttl edits - looks like we're on separate filesystems/copies of the repo (my patch.txt will be independent of yours). I've kept compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy as keyword-only-safe additions (Cache(...) call in configure_cache uses keyword args for the new params), so no positional collision risk on merge.
